arts.ttl: Plymouth stun Liverpool in FA Cup giant-killing
arts.sum: Watch highlights as the Championship's bottom side Plymouth Argyle knock out Premier League leaders Liverpool with a hard-fought victory in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes angry Liverpool demand after 'unacceptable' Plymouth defeat
arts.sum: Arne Slot fires a stern warning to his Liverpool side after the FA Cup defeat to Plymouth.

arts.ttl: Man City tie 'worth up to £1m' to Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle chairman Simon Hallett says their FA Cup fifth-round tie at Manchester City could be worth up to £1m to the Championship club.

arts.ttl: Man City to host Plymouth in FA Cup fifth round
arts.sum: Manchester City will host Championship strugglers Plymouth Argyle in the fifth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he wanted to start two more senior Liverpool stars in Plymouth loss
arts.sum: A much-changed Liverpool side lost 1-0 to Championship side Plymouth Argyle in the FA Cup, but some elements of the selection were out of manager Arne Slot's hands

arts.ttl: Unhappy Arne Slot slams 'unacceptable' Plymouth loss and rejects Liverpool fans' opinion
arts.sum: Some have suggested Liverpool's FA Cup exit at the hands of Plymouth Argyle could come with some positives, but Reds manager Arne Slot doesn't see things the same way

arts.ttl: Liverpool's 'unacceptable' defeat by Plymouth was NOT a blessing in disguise, Arne Slot insists as he prepares for his first Merseyside derby
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Premier League leaders were shocked on Sunday when Championship strugglers Plymouth pulled off the upset of the fourth round with a 1-0 victory in Devon.
